titleStmt.title: SII 6.1140: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1140. (A.R. No. 359-A of 1899). IN THE FIFTY-THIRD NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . svasti . bhāradvājānvayē jātaḥ sthirassadguṇabhūṣaṇaḥ .
śrīmān vallabhanaṁbīti khyātanāmā dvijōttamaḥ . 1 pu
ṇyābhivṛddhimākāṁkṣanmaṁcchanā¨ryyasya satpituḥ . pōtāmaṁ
cchakasaṁjñāyāḥ svamāturubhayōrapi . 2 śākābdē
bāṇadhātrīdinamaṇigaṇitē śrāvaṇē māsi pū¨rṇnē gu
¨rvvākhyāyāṁ ddaśamyāṁ hariśikharijuṣaḥ śrīnṛsiṁhasya gēhē .
prādādakṣayyapuṇyapradaśubhadivasēsau tṛtīyābhidhā
nē dvau niṣkau pāyasādyapracuraparilasat dhṛdyanai vēdyasidhdhyai . 3
dinēsminnēva ka¨rpūrakastūrīcaṁddanai¨rharēḥ . pūjā¨rtthaṁ svāyu
rārōgyasaṁppat kalyāṇavṛddhayē . 4 Ayamēva vuna¨rnniṣka
madādēkaṁ mudānvitaḥ . pālayaṁtvaniśaṁ dha¨rmmamimaṁ
vaiṣṇavasattamāḥ . 5 svasti śrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1215 gunēṁṭi śrīmadanaṁttava¨rmma pratāpavīra śrī
narasiṁhadēvarala prava¨rddhamānavijaya
rājya saṁvvatsaraṁbulu 18 gu śrāhi śrāvaṇa kṛṣṇa daśamiyu guruvāramunāṁḍu bhāradvāja
gōtrajuṁḍaina vallabhanaṁbyārulu tama taṁḍri maṁcchanapaṁḍitulakunnu tama talli pōtāmaṁcchakaku
nnu puṇyā¨rtthamugānu Akṣaya tṛtīyanāṁḍu śrīnarasiṁhānāthuniki naivēdyamulu Appālu pāya
sālu nānāvidhapiṁḍivaṁṭalu viḍiyālulōpaina vastuvulu Aragiṁcchuṭaku śrībhaṁḍāramuna peṭi
na gaṁḍamāḍālu 2 vīra Ī divasamaṁdu tamakunu Ayurārōgyaiśva¨ryyabhivṛddhigānu caṁdana
ka¨rppūramu cātuṭaku peṭṭina māḍa 1 Ī dha¨rmmuvu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣaḥ . śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 6.1140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
